name: pionless-agent
description: Cross-platform research agent package. Codex ships shared research skills through the plugin and installs matching custom-agent templates separately under ~/.codex/agents.

interface.shortDescription: Research agents with deep investigation and worker spawning
interface.longDescription: A research-agent package centered on named orchestrators and worker agents. The Codex plugin distributes reusable skills and MCP config; the installer also lays down matching custom-agent files under ~/.codex/agents so deep-research can fan out to worker and verifier agents.
defaultPrompt: Use the deep-research agent to investigate a topic and delegate worker agents.
Use the deep-research-worker agent to run a focused evidence-gathering pass on a subquestion.
Use the deep-research-verifier agent to seek contradictions in a current research thesis.
